info.name: HRM SAAS - Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for HRM SAAS Multi-Tenant HR Management System. Includes all endpoints for authentication, user management, attendance, roles, invitations, organization settings, and audit logs.

item.name: 1. BASE CONFIGURATION

exec: // Method 1: Using x-tenant-id header (recommended for testing)

request.description: Run this first to set up your environment variables. Edit the tenant_id in the Pre-request Script.

item.description: Run this folder first to configure your environment

item.name: 2. AUTHENTICATION

request.description: Authenticate user and receive JWT tokens
Refresh access token using refresh token
Logout user and invalidate refresh token
Reset password using token from email

item.description: Authentication endpoints for login, logout, and password management

item.name: 3. USER MANAGEMENT

request.description: Get paginated list of users (Admin/HR only)
Search users by name, email, or employee ID

exec: // Save user ID for later use

request.description: Get details of a specific user

item.description: User management endpoints for creating, updating, and managing users

item.name: 4. ROLE MANAGEMENT

request.description: Get details of a specific role
Delete a custom role (system roles cannot be deleted)
Assign HR role to a user
Revoke HR role from a user
Get all roles assigned to a user

item.description: Role management endpoints for creating and managing custom roles

item.name: 5. INVITATIONS

request.description: Create and send a new user invitation
Get details of a specific invitation
Accept an invitation and create account (public endpoint)

item.description: Invitation endpoints for sending and managing user invitations

request.description: Get attendance records (Admin/HR see all, employees see own)
Filter attendance records by date range
Get current user's monthly attendance statistics
Get details of a specific leave request
Get list of notifications for current user
Filter audit logs by action type

item.name: Filter Audit Logs by Date Range

request.description: Filter audit logs by date range
Get details of a specific audit log entry
Create a new tenant organization (Superuser only)
Get details of a specific tenant
Delete a tenant (WARNING: This deletes all tenant data)
Get all users for a specific tenant
